feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.q: Is the Free plan really free?
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features.

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users.

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work?
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period.

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person.

3.title: Europe 3 GB
3.desc: 3 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.

5.title: Europe 5 GB
5.desc: 5 GB of one-time eSIM data for Chatforia use across supported European countries.

unlimited.title: Europe Unlimited
unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported European countries, subject to fair-use and local network availability.

unlimited.title: Global Unlimited
unlimited.desc: Unlimited data for heavy Chatforia use across supported global destinations, subject to fair-use and local network availability.

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. What’s on your mind?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up?
greetings.long4: Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. What’s up?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add?
greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind?

safety.title: Safety & Community Guidelines
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining a safe and respectful environment for all users. These guidelines help ensure a positive experience for everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Users are expected to communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, or harmful behavior is not permitted.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email.
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases
thirdParty.body: If purchased through third-party platforms such as the Apple App Store, refunds must be requested directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA
